reportedIssues: Several horizontal sections are clipped at the right edge. The top category tab shows truncated text like “Hot Ga…”, and game cards in the right column are only partially visible.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game content at the bottom of the screen, partially covering the lower row of game cards.
The carousel/banner arrows sit very close to the screen edges and look partially cramped, especially the right arrow.
The header area is visually crowded with multiple logos, the Pennsylvania label, and the Join Now button packed into a small height.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue describes a negative jackpot value; all reported issues concern layout and spacing problems.
